title: desmodium quinquangulatum
intro: Desmodium quinquangulatum, also known as five-angled tick trefoil, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves with five distinct angles. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Desmodium quinquangulatum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, and alleviating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Desmodium quinquangulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be dried and made into a powder for use in various herbal remedies.
